title: Classic Improvements (Biomes o plenty)
description: This version of CIMS is made for the mod Biomes o plenty this texture pack is in alpha
body:
# Classic Improvements Biomes o plenty 
   
This texture pack is built for Biomes o plenty mod and was made so CIMS would be more compatible 

+ The goal of CIMS was to make the game more usable when programmer art is on but some mods don't have programmer art so this is what this fixes!

## NOTES

**THIS IS IN ALPHA SO THERE WILL BE TEXTURES MISSING OR MAY BE CHANGED OR TWEAKED**

**This requires [Classic Improvements](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classicimprovements) to work!**

**And the [Biomes o plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty) mod**

**Optifine and other mods that add Optifines features are not required _ONLY_ Classic Improvements needs them for a few features**

## Downloads

[Biomes o plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty)

[Classic Improvements](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classicimprovements)

## Todo list

Tweak the willow and hell bark logs
